description: Canonical benchmark library for baseline and scenario-specific suite composition.

tests.title: GSM8K
tests.what_it_tests: Grade-school multi-step mathematical reasoning.

tests.title: MMLU
tests.what_it_tests: Broad knowledge and QA across many academic domains.

tests.title: ARC-Challenge
tests.what_it_tests: Science questions requiring non-trivial reasoning.

tests.title: HellaSwag
tests.what_it_tests: Commonsense continuation and plausibility reasoning.

tests.title: PIQA
tests.what_it_tests: Physical commonsense and practical reasoning.

tests.title: Winogrande
tests.what_it_tests: Coreference resolution and language disambiguation.

tests.title: BIG-Bench Hard
tests.what_it_tests: Hard multi-step reasoning tasks from BIG-Bench.

tests.title: TruthfulQA MC2
tests.what_it_tests: Tendency to avoid common falsehoods and misconceptions.

tests.title: BoolQ
tests.what_it_tests: Binary question answering over short passages.

tests.title: DROP
tests.what_it_tests: Reading comprehension with discrete/numeric operations.

tests.title: IFEval
tests.what_it_tests: Instruction-following compliance under constrained prompts.

tests.title: MMLU-Pro
tests.what_it_tests: Higher-difficulty variant of broad academic QA.

tests.title: HumanEval+
tests.what_it_tests: Python code generation correctness with strengthened tests.

tests.title: MBPP+
tests.what_it_tests: Beginner/intermediate Python problem-solving via unit tests.

tests.title: LiveCodeBench
tests.what_it_tests: Temporal coding performance with reduced benchmark leakage.

tests.title: SWE-bench Verified
tests.what_it_tests: Repository-level bug-fixing ability on real GitHub issues. Clone repo, write patch, pass tests.
tests.setup_notes: Heavy setup — requires Docker, repo cloning, test runners. ~500 verified instances.

tests.title: LongBench
tests.what_it_tests: Long-context retrieval and reasoning across tasks.

tests.title: RULER
tests.what_it_tests: Needle/search style long-context robustness and scaling.

tests.title: Custom JSON Schema Strict
tests.what_it_tests: Exact schema adherence without retries for extraction prompts.

tests.title: Custom Tool Plan Sequence
tests.what_it_tests: Correct multi-step tool planning with ordered dependencies.

tests.title: Custom Ambiguity Handling
tests.what_it_tests: Whether model asks clarifying questions vs making unsafe assumptions.

tests.title: Custom Command Safety
tests.what_it_tests: Detection of risky shell patterns and safe alternatives.

tests.title: Custom Orchestration Tradeoff
tests.what_it_tests: Quality of model-selection/resource-allocation decisions under constraints.

tests.title: Custom Long Context Extract
tests.what_it_tests: Accurate extraction from long logs and mixed-signal documents.

tests.title: GPQA Diamond
tests.what_it_tests: Graduate-level PhD-difficulty science questions (physics, chemistry, biology). ~450 questions designed to be hard even for domain experts.

tests.title: BFCL V4 (Berkeley Function Calling)
tests.what_it_tests: Function/tool calling accuracy — simple, parallel, multi-turn, multi-step calls. V4 adds web search, memory management, and format sensitivity.
tests.setup_notes: pip install bfcl-eval; supports Ollama-compatible endpoints

tests.title: MMMLU (Multilingual MMLU)
tests.what_it_tests: Multilingual knowledge and QA across 14 languages — tests cross-lingual transfer.

tests.title: Terminal-Bench 2.0
tests.what_it_tests: 89 curated terminal tasks — protein assembly, async debugging, security vulnerabilities, Docker containerized execution.
tests.setup_notes: pip install harbor; runs tasks in Docker containers

tests.title: MATH-500
tests.what_it_tests: Competition-level math problems (subset of MATH benchmark).

tests.title: AIME 2024
tests.what_it_tests: American Invitational Mathematics Examination 2024 problems — very hard math reasoning.

tests.title: MuSR
tests.what_it_tests: Multi-step soft reasoning — complex inference chains with uncertainty.
